name: Jiekou.AI

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: The privacy policy says personal information is kept during the service period and may be retained longer where required for legal compliance or risk prevention; data no longer needed will be securely destroyed.

notes: Primary-source review found a privacy policy and terms of service, but no publicly available DPA/AVV, SCC commitment, sub-processor list, security certification page, EU data-residency statement, or AI Act statement. The service presents itself as a multi-model API gateway and routes requests to many third-party model providers, so EU-only inference processing is not guaranteed from the reviewed sources.
